subcodes.first_line: O thou who turnest thy face towards the Most Glorious Kingdom! By the life of my Lord, I have taken up the pen with utmost joy to write [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایها المتوجه الی الملکوت الابهی لعمر ربی اننی قد اخذت القلم بملا السرور لاکتب
subcodes.subjects: @evanescence and eternality; fana and baqa, @love of God
